LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS MARC BRUNO, SAVE NORTH BEACH'S MOTION AND MOTION FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 473(B). THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M. ON JULY 19, 2019. SOUND JUDICIAL POLICY REQUIRES CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473(B) MOTIONS TO BE HEARD BY THE SAME JUDGE WHO RENDERED THE DECISION FROM WHICH THE MOVING PARTY SEEKS RELIEF. (WALKER V. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY (2002) 100 CAL.APP.4TH 685, 693.) THE COURT INDICATES THE PARTIES MAY MAKE USE OF DEPT. 503'S EX PARTE HEARING CALENDAR TO SEEK AN EARLIER HEARING DATE. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Jul-19-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Petitioner MARC BRUNO (Tel: 415-434-1528) appearing in pro per;
Deputy City Attorney BRIAN F. CROSSMAN of the San Francisco Office of the City Attorney (Tel: 415-554-4690) appearing for Respondent City and Counsel of San Francisco.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PETITIONERS MARC BRUNO, SAVE NORTH BEACH.

The Court and parties discuss Mr. Bruno's objection to the transfer and continuance of today's hearing.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to be heard in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m. on July 19, 2019. Per SF Local Rule of Court 6.11(B) CEQA cases are heard in the CEQA Department.

The Court indicates the parties may make use of Dept. 503's ex parte hearing calendar to seek an earlier hearing date.

JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM (302/EPS)

The Court and parties discuss Mr. Bruno's objection to the transfer and continuance of today's hearing.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to be heard in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m. on July 19, 2019. Per SF Local Rule of Court 6.11(B) CEQA cases are heard in the CEQA Department.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief Under Ccp 473(B); Memorandum
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Jul-19-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Petitioner MARC BRUNO (Tel: 415-434-1528) appearing in pro per;
Deputy City Attorney BRIAN F. CROSSMAN of the San Francisco Office of the City Attorney (Tel: 415-554-4690) appearing for Respondent City and Counsel of San Francisco.

PETITIONERS MARC BRUNO, SAVE NORTH BEACH'S Motion And Motion For Relief Under Ccp 473(B).

The Court and parties discuss Mr. Bruno's objection to the transfer and continuance of today's hearing.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Transferred to be heard in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m. on July 19, 2019. Sound judicial policy requires Code of Civil Procedure section 473(b) motions to be heard by the same judge who rendered the decision from which the moving party seeks relief. (Walker v. San Francisco Housing Authority (2002) 100 Cal.App.4th 685, 693.)

The Court indicates the parties may make use of Dept. 503's ex parte hearing calendar to seek an earlier hearing date.

JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM (302/EPS)
